name: Edisto
description_short: Edisto Island is a South Carolina tourism destination, not a financial services company. The website is a travel guide operated by South Carolina's official tourism board.
description_long: Edisto Island is a small sea island located in South Carolina's ACE Basin, approximately 42 miles south of Charleston. It is promoted as a tourism destination by the South Carolina Department of Parks, Recreation and Tourism through the official state travel website DiscoverSouthCarolina.com. The island is described as mostly undeveloped and offers visitors a serene beach experience with rich cultural heritage and Lowcountry landscapes. Edisto Island is not a financial services company and does not offer payday alternatives, loans, credit services, or any consumer finance products whatsoever. The website content consists entirely of tourism information including vacation guides, lodging recommendations, dining options, recreational activities, and travel planning resources. There is no evidence of any financial products, lending services, or monetary transactions on this website. The presence of this entity in a payday-alternatives category on CreditDoc represents a fundamental miscategorization error. Edisto Island functions solely as a vacation destination marketed through South Carolina's state tourism infrastructure. The website directs visitors to beach parks, local shops, restaurants, and accommodations such as vacation rental homes and state park cabins.
services: Regional and city guides for South Carolina
Lodging recommendations (vacation rentals, state park cabins)
